'''Tosk-tar'ilya''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]/[[Commando/Legends|commando]] who was tasked with the sabotage of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]]' [[energy shield bunker 14]].<ref name="CatCW" />
